# Catalyst Works

> Diagnostic business consulting for SMB owner-operators, run by Boubacar Barry, a Salt Lake City, Utah fractional advisor. The core offer is the Executive Signal Session: a 90-minute structured diagnostic that names one business constraint, in writing, within 24 hours, for $497. Method is a constraint-based five-lens protocol. Also covers practical AI governance and fractional AI advisory for small and mid-sized businesses.

## What Catalyst Works does

- [Executive Signal Session ($497)](https://catalystworks.consulting): A 90-minute structured diagnostic interview using the five-lens protocol. You leave with one named constraint, three friction signals, and one concrete action. A one-page written summary is delivered within 24 hours.
- [AI Data Audit](https://catalystworks.consulting/ai-data-audit.html): Review of how a business handles its data and where AI can safely help.
- [AI Governance for SMBs](https://catalystworks.consulting/governance.html): Practical guardrails so a small business can adopt AI without exposing itself.
- [Signal Works — Lead Rescue OS](https://catalystworks.consulting/lead-rescue-os.html): Recovering revenue from leads a business already paid to generate.

## Who it is for

- SMB owner-operators who suspect something is quietly slowing their business but cannot name it.
- Founders in professional services, healthcare, home services (HVAC), and similar operator-led businesses.
- Serves Salt Lake City and the state of Utah, plus remote clients across North America.

## Key facts

- Founder and advisor: Boubacar Barry
- Location: Salt Lake City, Utah, United States
- Contact: diagnose@catalystworks.consulting
- LinkedIn (company): https://www.linkedin.com/company/catalyst-works-ai/
- LinkedIn (founder): https://www.linkedin.com/in/boubacarbarry/
- Flagship price point: $497 for the Executive Signal Session

## How to engage

- Try the 30-second diagnostic on the homepage, then book the full 90-minute session.
- Or email diagnose@catalystworks.consulting with the one surface of your business you want a second pair of eyes on. You get a reply within one working day.
